center.name: Atherton, Queensland
center.summary: Atherton, Queensland是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括褐鹃鸠、Bridled honeyeater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bridled honeyeater is found in upland rainforest and wet eucalypt forest above an altitude of 300 metres in the Atherton region, north-east Queensland, Australia. The range extends from the Bloomfield-Mt Amos area south to Mt Spec

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown cuckoo-dove (Macropygia phasianella) is a dove in the genus Macropygia found in Australia from Weipa and Aurukun in the north to Bega in the south, and most inland at Atherton and Toowoomba
